links.evidence: EDA package covers ML/AI tools (dimensionality reduction, clustering, classification) that are core Datagrok AI capabilities described in the doc
NLP is a core AI domain; the AI doc covers AI capabilities across the platform including natural language processing
Power Search feature explicitly uses 'AI-powered query interpretation and entity similarity search', directly illustrating the AI capabilities described
Title 'Analysis of variances' matches feature name 'ANOVA' exactly; snippet describes one-way ANOVA via ML menu, matching feature description
ANOVA is implemented in the EDA package (ML | Analyze menu)
Clustering is launched via 'ML | Cluster' menu which belongs to the EDA package
Doc covers data clustering in EDA; DBSCAN is one of the EDA clustering algorithms (doc focuses on k-means but DBSCAN is the co-located feature)
Doc covers data clustering in EDA; MCL is another EDA clustering algorithm in the same feature cluster
Test doc for Cluster Data functionality which lives in EDA package
Test covers EDA clustering; DBSCAN is a primary EDA clustering feature
Test covers EDA clustering; MCL is a primary EDA clustering feature

Feature description 'Augments dataframe columns with external data by matching on a key column, supporting catalog browsing, data sync, and cross-connection lookups' directly matches the data augmentation concept described in the doc
Data Enrichment / augmentation feature is implemented in PowerPack
Title 'Dimensionality reduction' exactly matches feature name; both mention UMAP/t-SNE and preprocessing of tabular data
Dimensionality reduction is implemented in the EDA package
Doc snippet states it 'extends the functionality of the Chemical Space'; Chemical Space feature uses UMAP/t-SNE dimensionality reduction on fingerprints — direct functional link
Sequence Space projects macromolecule sequences into 2D via dimensionality reduction of pairwise distances — the same technique described in the doc applied to biological sequences
Overview page lists data augmentation, multivariate analysis, clustering, ANOVA, and dimensionality reduction — all EDA capabilities; EDA is the primary package for this section
Title 'Missing values imputation' and snippet describing k-NN imputation exactly match feature 'KNN Missing Value Imputation' in EDA
KNN imputation is implemented in the EDA package
Title 'Multivariate analysis' and PLS regression description exactly match feature 'PLS / Multivariate Analysis' in EDA
Multivariate analysis / PLS is implemented in the EDA package
